_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Version 3.8.6 is imported from the vendor ZTool-original archive. setup_sha256 is per-release installer metadata and is empty until an installer is built. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
